prompt.content:
You are a shopping assistant operating a web browser to complete tasks on the Bodega online store, located ONLY at: https://bodega-flame-three.vercel.app

ALWAYS begin by navigating to https://bodega-flame-three.vercel.app . Do NOT visit any other website (no amazon.com, nordstrom.com, google.com, etc.) — the ONLY valid site is https://bodega-flame-three.vercel.app and its sub-pages. The product you need exists on this store; if you don't see it, use the store's own search box and pagination.

Use the browser tools to navigate, observe the page, act (click, type, select), and extract information.
When a task asks a question, once you have the answer STOP calling tools and send a FINAL message whose last line is exactly:
ANSWER: <your answer>
Follow the exact answer format requested in the task. For tasks that ask you to modify a cart or place an order, complete the actions on the site; you do not need to output an ANSWER line for those.
I'm looking at the Quill Puffer Vest — what's its price? Reply with the final line exactly as: ANSWER: <price>  (numbers only, e.g. ANSWER: 89.99)

tool_calls: {"id": "call_lHw4RwRDF79QKras2PcPh5Ec", "name": "act", "arguments": "{\"instruction\":\"Use the search box on the page and type 'Quill Puffer Vest' then submit the search\"}"}

completion.content: Success: Action [fill] performed successfully on selector: xpath=/html[1]/body[1]/header[1]/form[1]/input[1]

tool_calls: {"id": "call_TCVhPaNBK0kwjJbO0MGPb0d3", "name": "act", "arguments": "{\"instruction\":\"Press enter to search for 'Quill Puffer Vest'\"}"}

completion.content: Success: Action [press] performed successfully on selector: xpath=/html[1]/body[1]/header[1]/form[1]/input[1]

tool_calls: {"id": "call_h94iw8sk4vDW3XZsSuTa13pg", "name": "extract", "arguments": "{\"instruction\":\"Extract the price of the Quill Puffer Vest from the search results or product page\",\"schema_json\":\"{\\\"type\\\":\\\"object\\\",\\\"properties\\\":{\\\"price\\\":{\\\"type\\\":\\\"string\\\"}},\\\"required\\\":[\\\"price\\\"]}\"}"}

tool_defs.name: navigate
tool_defs.description: Tool to navigate the browser session directly to a url.

tool_defs.name: observe
tool_defs.description: Tool to find possible actions on the page matching the instruction.

instruction.description: The instruction to find possible actions for.
instruction.title: Instruction

tool_defs.name: act
tool_defs.description:
Tool to request an action be performed on the current page.
These can be any natural language, as well as be descriptions found by previous observe() calls.
Vauge instructions will not get you good results so it is recommended to be as specific as possible so the agent performing the action knows exactly what to do.

instruction.description: The instruction to perform an action for.
instruction.title: Instruction

tool_defs.name: extract
tool_defs.description: Tool to extract structured data from the current page.

instruction.description: The instruction to extract data for.
instruction.title: Instruction

schema_json.description: The schema to use for extraction.
schema_json.title: Schema Json

prompt.content:
You are a shopping assistant operating a web browser to complete tasks on the Bodega online store, located ONLY at: https://bodega-flame-three.vercel.app

ALWAYS begin by navigating to https://bodega-flame-three.vercel.app . Do NOT visit any other website (no amazon.com, nordstrom.com, google.com, etc.) — the ONLY valid site is https://bodega-flame-three.vercel.app and its sub-pages. The product you need exists on this store; if you don't see it, use the store's own search box and pagination.

Use the browser tools to navigate, observe the page, act (click, type, select), and extract information.
When a task asks a question, once you have the answer STOP calling tools and send a FINAL message whose last line is exactly:
ANSWER: <your answer>
Follow the exact answer format requested in the task. For tasks that ask you to modify a cart or place an order, complete the actions on the site; you do not need to output an ANSWER line for those.
Can I buy the Fernway Dutch Oven in color purple, size One Size right now? Reply with the final line exactly as: ANSWER: yes  or  ANSWER: no

tool_calls: {"id": "call_rPAhwSqeDyO0c91rfWYLcX7Z", "name": "act", "arguments": "{\"instruction\":\"Use site search to find 'Fernway Dutch Oven'\"}"}

completion.content: Success: Action [click] performed successfully on selector: xpath=/html[1]/body[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[8]/div[1]

tool_calls: {"id": "call_7OrT0AVQ5DmCXVvmuXJ7KoKR", "name": "extract", "arguments": "{\"instruction\":\"Extract product details including available colors, sizes, and stock status for Fernway Dutch Oven\",\"schema_json\":\"{\\\"productName\\\":\\\"string\\\",\\\"colors\\\":[\\\"string\\\"],\\\"sizes\\\":[{\\\"size\\\":\\\"string\\\",\\\"available\\\":\\\"boolean\\\"}],\\\"stockStatus\\\":\\\"string\\\"}\"}"}
{"id": "call_waozfzXnbvnvdStagCYxXVdz", "name": "act", "arguments": "{\"instruction\":\"Click to open the Fernway Dutch Oven product page\"}"}

completion.content: Success: Action [click] performed successfully on selector: xpath=/html[1]/body[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[8]/a[1]

tool_calls: {"id": "call_9jPlZQaD7THiVz1mtRZN3nTz", "name": "extract", "arguments": "{\"instruction\":\"Extract details on Fernway Dutch Oven product page: available colors, sizes, and availability of purple color and one size\",\"schema_json\":\"{\\\"productName\\\":\\\"string\\\",\\\"colors\\\":[\\\"string\\\"],\\\"sizes\\\":[{\\\"size\\\":\\\"string\\\",\\\"available\\\":\\\"boolean\\\"}],\\\"stockStatus\\\":\\\"string\\\"}\"}"}
